message:
style(engine): refactor semantic twin assumptions to vec literal and add clippy allow

- semantic_twin_state_space.rs: Refactor assumptions vector
  construction from sequential `.push()` calls to a single `vec![...]`
  literal initializer.  Same logic, more idiomatic and readable.
- semantic_twin.rs: Add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]` on
  `state_variable` function to suppress false positive, and apply
  minor rustfmt line-break fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
